objectives.title: Improve Patient Safety and Care Quality
objectives.description: Reduce hospital-acquired infections, surgical errors, and adverse incidents. Achieve accreditation standards, implement clinical protocols, and improve patient satisfaction scores across all wards.

objectives.title: Expand Hospital Capacity and Infrastructure
objectives.description: Increase bed capacity from 75 to 150 beds by acquiring adjacent land and completing a phased construction programme. Add new specialty wards for cardiac, elderly, and maternity care.

objectives.title: Develop and Retain a Skilled Workforce
objectives.description: Recruit specialist clinicians, invest in nurse training programmes, reduce staff turnover, and build a culture of continuous professional development and staff wellbeing.

objectives.title: Modernise Digital Systems and Technology
objectives.description: Replace the ageing hospital information system with a modern electronic health record platform, automate administrative workflows, and improve data reporting and cybersecurity.

objectives.title: Achieve Financial Sustainability and Growth
objectives.description: Grow revenue through new service lines and medical tourism, control operational costs, improve procurement efficiency, and ensure the hospital remains profitable to fund future investments.
